## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded domain values added to any screen — data comes from a
      provider (`useProviders()` / `useProviderData()`)
- [ ] If a new provider method or API endpoint was added, `src/types/index.ts`
      and/or `docs/API.md` were updated to match
- [ ] If this touches scanner behavior or a collector, it stays within the
      metadata-only allow-list in [PRIVACY.md](../PRIVACY.md)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (runs `tsc -b`)
- [ ] UI changes include a before/after screenshot
